CustomField.label: Pause Patient Insurance
CustomField.description: Patient insurance plan handed in-band via hidden prechat (canonical token: medicare/medicaid/aetna/bcbs/uhc/cigna/humana/kaiser); mapped to bot context Pause_Patient_Insurance and the Find-a-Provider action insurance input. Note: insuranceAccepted on the Pause provider directory is synthetically derived today (no public payer feed); agent should frame the match as a soft filter, not a guarantee.
